'''paludu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psammology|psammology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psammology|psammology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paludu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pælidith|pælidith]] || [[word:pælidij|pælidij]] || [[word:pælidish|pælidish]] || [[word:pælidi|pælidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:paluluduth|paluluduth]] || [[word:paluluduj|paluluduj]] || [[word:paluludush|paluludush]] || [[word:paluludu|paluludu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:paluduth|paluduth]] || [[word:paluduj|paluduj]] || [[word:paludush|paludush]] || [[word:paludu|paludu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:palufdufth|palufdufth]] || [[word:palufdufj|palufdufj]] || [[word:palufdufsh|palufdufsh]] || [[word:palufduf|palufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:paluduthu|paluduthu]] || [[word:paluduju|paluduju]] || [[word:paludushu|paludushu]] || [[word:paluduku|paluduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:paluduth|paluduth]] || [[word:paluduj|paluduj]] || [[word:paludush|paludush]] || [[word:paludu|paludu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:paluduthul|paluduthul]] || [[word:paludujul|paludujul]] || [[word:paludushul|paludushul]] || [[word:paludukul|paludukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:paluduuthuthu|paluduuthuthu]] || [[word:paluduujuju|paluduujuju]] || [[word:paluduushushu|paluduushushu]] || [[word:paluduuku|paluduuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:paluduthun|paluduthun]] || [[word:paludujun|paludujun]] || [[word:paludushun|paludushun]] || [[word:paludukun|paludukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:paluduthuoro|paluduthuoro]] || [[word:paludujuoro|paludujuoro]] || [[word:paludushuoro|paludushuoro]] || [[word:paludukuoro|paludukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
